leadText: The Dawn Stone (Japanese: めざめいし Awakening Stone) is a type of Evolution stone introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Can be used to evolve one of several Pokémon. This consumes the Dawn Stone. Causes male Kirlia to evolve into Gallade Causes female Snorunt to evolve into Froslass

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers a Dawn Stone at Luminous Spring , male Kirlia and female Snorunt can be evolved into Gallade and Froslass , respectively. This consumes the Dawn Stone. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Dawn Stone is required to evolve certain Pokémon in Pokémon Sleep. It is consumed upon use. Male Kirlia requires 80 Ralts Candy and a Dawn Stone to evolve into Gallade .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It sparkles like eyes. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V ZA A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It sparkles like a glittering eye.
